name: Sima Jun (Yuanyi)
page_title: Sima Jun (Yuanyi) 司馬儁 (元異) [Han] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Sima Jun, styled Yuanyi and born in Henei, was the on of Sima Liang. He was a big man, eight feet three inches tall [192 cm] and broad about the waist. A leader among his kinsmen and the young men of the region, he was also a man of considerable learning. He became Administrator of Yingchuan.

[NOTE]Source: [CITE=RAFE:TOME]

full_text:
Sima Jun (Yuanyi) 司馬儁 (元異)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Jun (司馬儁), styledYuanyi (元異), was born in Henei. Grandfather of Sima Yi. Father of Sima Fang. Governor of Yingchuan. Sima Jun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Sima Jun lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
